title: Human Resource Executive
description:
The Human Resource Executive (HRE) will serve as a key member of the hotel's Human Resources team, acting as a strategic partner to the leadership team while supporting the day-to-day HR operations. The HRE will be responsible for aligning HR initiatives with business objectives, providing expert HR guidance to management and employees, and ensuring the successful execution of HR strategies across the hotel.

Key Responsibilities:

Strategic HR Partnership:

  • Collaborate with department heads to understand business goals and objectives and align HR strategies to support these goals.
  • Provide insights and recommendations to improve organizational effectiveness, talent management, and employee engagement.

Employee Relations:

  • Act as a trusted advisor to management on employee relations issues, providing guidance on conflict resolution, disciplinary actions, and employee performance management.
  • Foster a positive work environment by promoting open communication and resolving employee concerns in a timely and fair manner.

Performance Management:

  • Lead the performance appraisal process, ensuring timely and constructive feedback is provided to employees.
  • Partner with managers to develop and implement individual development plans (IDPs) that align with career aspirations and organizational goals.

Compliance & HR Policy:

  • Ensure compliance with local labor laws and regulations and maintain up-to-date knowledge of Singapore's HR best practices and legal requirements.
  • Develop, implement, and communicate HR policies and procedures that align with the company’s values and objectives.

HR Metrics & Reporting:

  • Analyze HR data to identify trends, make data-driven decisions, and provide reports to management on key HR metrics.
  • Monitor and report on workforce planning, turnover rates, employee satisfaction, and other HR metrics.

Culture & Employee Engagement:

  • Promote and sustain a positive organizational culture that supports the hotel's mission and values.
  • Drive employee engagement initiatives, including recognition programs, team-building activities, and corporate social responsibility (CSR) efforts.

Qualifications:

  • Minimum Diploma in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
  • Strong knowledge of Singapore employment laws and regulations.
  • Proven experience in talent management, employee relations, and performance management.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build relationships at all levels of the organization.
  • Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities.
  • Proficiency in HR analytics and reporting.

postedCompany.description:
Laguna Hotel Holdings Pte Ltd, consists of Laguna National Golf Resort Club and Dusit Thani Laguna Singapore.


About Dusit Thani Laguna Singapore

Situated within the prestigious grounds of Laguna National Golf Resort Club, Dusit Thani Laguna Singapore offers the perfect blend of luxury and convenience. Just 10 minutes from Changi International Airport and 15 minutes from downtown Singapore, this 5-star luxury198-room resort showcases contemporary Asian design, making it ideal for both business and leisure travelers.

Guests at Dusit Thani Laguna Singapore can enjoy a wide array of experiences and top-tier facilities, including:

  • Greenhouse: A multi-ethnic, all-day dining restaurant featuring live cooking stations
  • The Tee Deck: An al fresco bar & grill
  • Legends Bar and Dusit Gourmet
  • The Nest: A members-only restaurant where hotel stay guests also have access
  • DFit: A fully-equipped gym
  • Three swimming pools and tennis courts
  • The 9-hole Laguna Putting Course
  • Deverana Wellness: Dusit’s signature spa experience

For events and meetings, the resort offers a range of flexible spaces, including:

  • A boardroom and two meeting rooms
  • An outdoor lawn and eight pavilions
  • A pillarless ballroom that seats up to 480 guests, with a stunning pre-function area overlooking the golf course

In addition to these facilities, guests enjoy privileged access to Laguna National’s world-class championship Classic and Masters golf courses, making this an exceptional destination for golfers and visitors alike.


For more information, visit https://www.dusit.com/dusitthani-laguna-singapore/


About Laguna National Golf Resort Club


Since its establishment in 1993, Laguna National Golf Resort Club has been a key player in both the local and regional golf scene, recognized as one of Singapore’s premier golf and country clubs. The club features two 18-hole championship golf courses, renowned for their prestigious accolades and for hosting international tournaments.

Recently undergoing a multi-million-dollar revamp, Laguna National is now home to not only a world-class golf club but also a luxury urban resort, in partnership with Dusit Thani. The resort offers 198 rooms and suites, along with eight exclusive pavilions. In addition to these accommodations, the club provides numerous facilities, including a luxurious spa, a modern fitness center, and premium services for golfers of all levels. These include:

  • A 9-hole Laguna Putting Course
  • Laguna Practice powered by Toptracer Range
  • Leadbetter Golf Academy (LGA)

The club also has exclusive member areas with private locker rooms, enhancing the membership experience.

Located near the airport, beach, and shopping malls, Laguna National offers unparalleled convenience, making it a world-class destination for golfers, members, and resort guests.


For more information, visit www.lagunanational.com.
